<h1 id="heading-1">Cloud Server</h1><h2 id="heading-2">What is Cloud Server</h2><p>Simply put, a cloud server is a computer that doesn’t shut down.</p><h2 id="heading-3">Why do We Need a Cloud Server</h2><p>As a software developer, you may need a cloud server for the following reasons:</p><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class">Deploying Applications:</strong> Deploy your applications on a cloud server to make them accessible and usable globally.</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class">Collaboration and Remote Access:</strong> Cloud servers enable team members to remotely access and collaborate on development, testing, and deployment of applications, regardless of their location</p></li></ul><h2 id="heading-4">How to Get a Cloud Server</h2><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p><a href="https://cloud.tencent.com/act/pro/free">https://cloud.tencent.com/act/pro/free</a></p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p><a href="https://aws.amazon.com/ec2">https://aws.amazon.com/ec2</a></p></li></ul><h2 id="heading-5">Install Softwares</h2><h3 id="heading-6">Update Packages</h3><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;new code block&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;sudo apt update&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="94c53845-9c06-4eb9-83cb-d5e58b4db5bf"></pre><h3 id="heading-7">Install Softwares</h3><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;new code block&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;sudo apt install git&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="94c53845-9c06-4eb9-83cb-d5e58b4db5bf"></pre><h2 id="heading-8">Deploy Your Project to Cloud Server</h2><p>Publish your project a cloud server so others can access it through a link like:</p><p>http://123.456.3.4:8000</p><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" title=""><toc></toc><h3 id="heading-9">Clone Project</h3><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;git clone https://github.com/dicky0411/API-Country&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="0845b2f3-d541-426f-9eec-574bc25b44fb"></pre><h3 id="heading-10">Install Composer</h3><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;new code block&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;sudo apt get install composer&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="452cc755-a744-4c6f-95a0-d7110616de0a"></pre><h3 id="heading-11">Install PHP Packages</h3><p>Install PHP packages</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;new code block&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;composer install&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="0845b2f3-d541-426f-9eec-574bc25b44fb"></pre><h3 id="heading-12">Install PHP Extensions</h3><p>If the output is something like this</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;Installing dependencies from lock file (including require-dev)\nVerifying lock file contents can be installed on current platform.\nYour lock file does not contain a compatible set of packages. Please run composer update.\n\n  Problem 1\n    - tijsverkoyen/css-to-inline-styles is locked to version v2.2.7 and an update of this package was not requested.\n    - tijsverkoyen/css-to-inline-styles v2.2.7 requires ext-dom * -> it is missing from your system. Install or enable PHP's dom extension.\n  Problem 2\n    - laravel/pint is locked to version v1.16.2 and an update of this package was not requested.\n    - laravel/pint v1.16.2 requires ext-xml * -> it is missing from your system. Install or enable PHP's xml extension.\n  Problem 3\n    - phar-io/manifest is locked to version 2.0.4 and an update of this package was not requested.\n    - phar-io/manifest 2.0.4 requires ext-dom * -> it is missing from your system. Install or enable PHP's dom extension.\n  Problem 4\n    - phpunit/php-code-coverage is locked to version 11.0.5 and an update of this package was not requested.\n    - phpunit/php-code-coverage 11.0.5 requires ext-dom * -> it is missing from your system. Install or enable PHP's dom extension.\n  Problem 5\n    - phpunit/phpunit is locked to version 11.2.8 and an update of this package was not requested.\n    - phpunit/phpunit 11.2.8 requires ext-dom * -> it is missing from your system. Install or enable PHP's dom extension.\n  Problem 6\n    - sebastian/comparator is locked to version 6.0.1 and an update of this package was not requested.\n    - sebastian/comparator 6.0.1 requires ext-dom * -> it is missing from your system. Install or enable PHP's dom extension.\n  Problem 7\n    - theseer/tokenizer is locked to version 1.2.3 and an update of this package was not requested.\n    - theseer/tokenizer 1.2.3 requires ext-dom * -> it is missing from your system. Install or enable PHP's dom extension.\n  Problem 8\n    - tijsverkoyen/css-to-inline-styles v2.2.7 requires ext-dom * -> it is missing from your system. Install or enable PHP's dom extension.\n    - laravel/framework v11.16.0 requires tijsverkoyen/css-to-inline-styles ^2.2.5 -> satisfiable by tijsverkoyen/css-to-inline-styles[v2.2.7].\n    - laravel/framework is locked to version v11.16.0 and an update of this package was not requested.\n\nTo enable extensions, verify that they are enabled in your .ini files:\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/php.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/10-opcache.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/10-pdo.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-calendar.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-ctype.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-curl.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-exif.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-ffi.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-fileinfo.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-ftp.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-gettext.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-iconv.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-intl.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-mbstring.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-phar.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-posix.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-readline.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-shmop.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-sockets.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-sysvmsg.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-sysvsem.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-sysvshm.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-tokenizer.ini\n    - /etc/php/8.3/cli/conf.d/20-zip.ini\nYou can also run `php --ini` in a terminal to see which files are used by PHP in CLI mode.\nAlternatively, you can run Composer with `--ignore-platform-req=ext-dom --ignore-platform-req=ext-xml` to temporarily ignore these required extensions.&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="452cc755-a744-4c6f-95a0-d7110616de0a"></pre><p></p><p>Try to install the missing extensions:</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;new code block&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;sudo apt install php8.3-dom&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="452cc755-a744-4c6f-95a0-d7110616de0a"></pre><p>Then retry<strong class="my-custom-class"> composer install</strong></p><h3 id="heading-13">Run the Project</h3>
